title: CellaKay
body:
The beginning of something bigger

This mod is in its earliest alpha version, it's just a baby, but I plan to add many features to it as the development process continues.

You can find our other work at:
https://kaytech.org/

+=----------------------------------------------------------------------------------=+

At the moment, this mod includes additional bonuses to the block and ore set, which add some effects if you have a full armor set of one type of equipment, and interesting style additions:

  - Item development with a new table? Use the diamond grinder for that!
  - Ruby appears from control 5 to -50
  - Ruby only appears in the standard world

+=----------------------------------------------------------------------------------=+

Join the community and download today!
